allOf.description: Indicates whether users can use Windows clients to access their WorkSpaces.
Indicates whether users can use macOS clients to access their WorkSpaces.
Indicates whether users can access their WorkSpaces through a web browser.
Indicates whether users can use iOS devices to access their WorkSpaces.
Indicates whether users can use Android and Android-compatible Chrome OS devices to access their WorkSpaces.
Indicates whether users can use Chromebooks to access their WorkSpaces.
Indicates whether users can use zero client devices to access their WorkSpaces.
Indicates whether users can use Linux clients to access their WorkSpaces.

description: The device types and operating systems that can be used to access a WorkSpace. For more information, see Amazon WorkSpaces Client Network Requirements.
name: WorkspaceAccessProperties
